subject: docs(audit): fix 10 documentation accuracy issues
body:
CLAUDE.md: Add Project Status section with current features, schema v8,
and tech stack summary. Was required by doc spec but missing.

README.md: Fix CSS framework (UnoCSS → Tailwind CSS v4), add 5 missing
components, 6 missing composables, 1 missing engine file to project
structure. Correct schema v6→v8. Fix import wizard 3→2 steps.

USER_GUIDE.md: Rewrite import wizard from 3-step (Upload/Classify/Confirm)
to 2-step (Upload/Review & Import) matching actual implementation. Add
"Check for updates" to help menu list.

TESTING_GUIDE.md: Fix menu item count (5→6), rewrite import Step 2/3 test
scenarios to match per-transaction review flow, add "Check for updates"
test scenario (5.3).

Tags: docs, accuracy, audit, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-quality
Semver: patch
